title: Return remaining_items_count with items_page
excerpt:
Include the ability to along with the cursor return a remaining_items_count with items_page. 
This way for large fetches we can provide a progress bar. This also helps with integrations to estimate remaining time to retr…

posts.author: anon29275264 (anon29275264)
posts.cookedHtml:
Include the ability to along with the cursor return a remaining_items_count with items_page.

This way for large fetches we can provide a progress bar. This also helps with integrations to estimate remaining time to retrieve and abort early if it will exceed timeout (and queue the operation into an asynchronous process)

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you @anon29275264 for the request!
